name: Massimo Freccia
abstract: Massimo Filippo Antongiulio Maria Freccia (19 September 1906 – 16 November 2004) was an Italian American conductor. He had an international reputation but never held a post as music director of a major orchestra or opera house.

about_quotes.speaker: Rudy Mazzari
about_quotes.evidence: I was a record librarian. That's how I got to know Massimo Freccia a little better than the average musician in the orchestra through music.
